com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXGraphicObject

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXBaseGraphicObject, IXDiagramBaseObject, IXObject, IXWriteableObject
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXArc, IXCircle, IXCurve, IXDrillPoint, IXGraphicDatum, IXGraphicGroup, IXGraphicSymbol, IXHarnessDiagramRegion, IXPolygon, IXPolyline, IXRectangle, IXText

    public interface IXGraphicObject
extends IXDiagramBaseObject, IXWriteableObject, IXBaseGraphicObject
    Base Interface to represent all propertied graphic objects.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXObject getOwner()
      Get the owning object.
      java.awt.geom.Rectangle2D getRelativeExtent()
      Get relative extent of this diagram object wrt to its parent as a rectangle in real world coordinates.
      boolean isGrouped()
      check if the graphic object is a member of a graphic group.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXDiagramBaseObject

        getDiagram, getZoneInfo

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXWriteableObject

        getAttributeSetter

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXObject

        getAttribute, getAttributes, getBaseID, getID, getParentID, getProperties, getProperty, getSymbol, toHTML, toHTML

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXBaseGraphicObject

        getAbsoluteExtent

    • Method Detail

      • getRelativeExtent

        java.awt.geom.Rectangle2D getRelativeExtent()
        Get relative extent of this diagram object wrt to its parent as a rectangle in real world coordinates. Example: if this is a pin diagram object, then the extent returned by this method is relative to its parent.
        Returns:
        relative extent of this diagram object wrt to its parent as a rectangle whose (x, y) as lower left corner

      • isGrouped

        boolean isGrouped()
        check if the graphic object is a member of a graphic group.
        Returns:
        true if the graphic object is a member of a graphic group otherwise false.

      • getOwner

        IXObject getOwner()
        Get the owning object. This can be diagram or some other diagram object i.e pinlist etc.
        Returns:
        the owning object if it exists, null otherwise.
